Creates an informational message about the application.

Creates and returns the button panel with export, import, and save buttons.

Creates and returns the center panel with the button panel and the table scroll pane.
createFilmDialog() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.ActionsMenuView
Method that displays a dialog for adding a new film to the database, with fields for entering film details such as title, description, release year, genre, and rating.

Creates the main films panel with border layout and background color.

Creates and configures the films table.

Creates and configures the genre combo box with predefined genres.

Creates and configures the genre combo box.

Creates and returns a header label for the view.

Creates and configures the left panel with search and filter components.
